name: The Bridge
description: The wheelhouse and open bridge wing at the forward end of the Boat Deck — Captain Smith stands at the forward window looking at the black water that is now only forty feet below the bow, and the compass binnacle glows green in the dark, a small domestic detail in a room that has become a vigil.
atmosphericDetails: Captain Smith has not given an order in twenty minutes — he stands with his hands behind his back, watching the bow, and the quartermaster at the wheel has nothing to do but stand at his post
The engine room telegraphs are set to STOP and their brass handles are cold — the vibration that has been the ship's constant companion for four days is gone, replaced by a silence that feels wrong
Andrews's notebook lies open on the chart table, his flooding calculations visible in neat pencil columns — someone has placed it there deliberately, and it has not been moved
